name: Canon ST-E10 Speedlite Transmitter
description: Dedicated to select Canon cameras featuring a Multi-Function Shoe, such as the Canon R3, the ST-E10 Speedlite Transmitter is a compact, lightweight transmitter capable of triggering up to five groups or 15 individual Speedlites within a 98.4' range.

features.Key Features: For Wireless Speedlite Setups | For Canon Cameras w/ Multi-Function Shoe | Powered Directly from Camera | No Battery or Cabling Required | 5 Groups or 15 Individual Speedlites | 98.4' Wireless Range | Settings Adjustment via Camera
features.What's In The Box: Canon ST-E10 Speedlite Transmitter | Shoe Cap | Case
